# Inkspirations Studios Portfolio

AI-readable access file for ChatGPT and other assistants.

Public homepage: https://rm337.github.io/markdown-portfolio/
Portfolio world page: https://rm337.github.io/markdown-portfolio/portfolio.html#world
Artwork gallery: https://rm337.github.io/markdown-portfolio/portfolio.html#portfolio
Interactive rooms: https://rm337.github.io/markdown-portfolio/portfolio.html#interactive
Artist: Robert Marleton
Studio: Inkspirations Studios
Focus: digital artwork, hand-lettering, ocean-inspired creative systems, writing, music rooms, functional art experiments, and interactive studio environments.

## Site Structure

The homepage is a calm studio lobby with no artwork grid or large artwork images.

The portfolio page organizes the full Inkspirations world:
- Studio World map
- Artwork Gallery
- Writing / Poem home
- Coasters / Functional Art home
- Interactive Rooms and Tools
- Music / Creative Atmosphere
- Contact paths

## Current Artwork Gallery

The gallery contains 21 curated entries and is rendered by portfolio.js. Entries 1-19 are artwork/image entries; entries 20-21 are project entries for functional art and writing.

1. Burned Motion / Razorback
   Medium: Burned Motion Study
   Category: Signature Collection
   File: assets/images/portfolio/red-motion-panel.jpg
   Description: A red motion study with a charging razorback form and a rough, energetic surface. The piece leads the portfolio as a signature work.

2. Submersion
   Medium: Lettering / Ink Study
   Category: Fluid Soul Series
   File: assets/images/portfolio/soul-current.jpg
   Description: A blue ink field with the word Submersion set into soft wash, suspended marks, and quiet depth.

3. Sunflower Mandala
   Medium: Pattern Study
   Category: Nature & Organic
   File: assets/images/portfolio/sunflower-mandala.jpg
   Description: A bright organic pattern study centered on a sunflower form. The piece adds warmth and structure to the collection.

4. Release
   Medium: Digital Lettering
   Category: Signature Collection
   File: assets/images/portfolio/blue-name-current.jpg
   Description: A blue lettering piece built around the word Release, with layered current-like movement surrounding the central script.

5. Washed Out
   Medium: Digital Lettering
   Category: Signature Collection
   File: assets/images/portfolio/washed-out.jpg
   Description: A blue and violet lettering piece with the phrase Washed Out set into a soft atmospheric field.

6. Lest We Forget
   Medium: Digital Collage
   Category: Experimental Works
   File: assets/images/portfolio/lest-we-forget.jpg
   Description: A high-contrast digital collage centered on the phrase Lest We Forget, with red, blue, light, and rough texture layered together.

7. We Are Not Descended From Fearful Men
   Medium: Wood / Lettering
   Category: Nature & Organic
   File: assets/images/portfolio/wood-warning.jpg
   Description: A wood-burned lettering piece using the natural round, cracks, bark edge, and burned marks as part of the composition.

8. Rainline Study
   Medium: Ink Study
   Category: Texture Studies
   File: assets/images/portfolio/rainline-study.jpg
   Description: A vertical texture study built from repeated marks and soft color movement. It reads as surface, rhythm, and weather.

9. Blue Field
   Medium: Texture Study
   Category: Texture Studies
   File: assets/images/portfolio/blue-field.jpg
   Description: A quiet blue texture field focused on grain, tone, and surface movement. It functions as a supporting study rather than a main signature piece.

10. Love Study (Title Pending)
   Medium: Mixed Media
   Category: Words & Expressions
   File: assets/images/portfolio/love-texture.jpg
   Description: A word-based texture piece centered on Love, with a worn layered surface. The final full title is still pending.

11. Between Waves
   Medium: Lettering
   Category: Words & Expressions
   File: assets/images/portfolio/blessed-water.jpg
   Description: A soft lettering piece set into pale blue waterlike bands, with the phrase Between Waves moving through the lower edge.

12. Electric Love
   Medium: Lettering Study
   Category: Words & Expressions
   File: assets/images/portfolio/infinite-love-red.jpg
   Description: A saturated lettering study built around Electric Love, with strong color, script, and a charged central word form.

13. Electric Love, Blue Variation
   Medium: Lettering Study
   Category: Words & Expressions
   File: assets/images/portfolio/infinite-love-violet.jpg
   Description: A cooler blue-violet variation of Electric Love, shifting the same phrase into a deeper atmospheric register.

14. U R Priceless
   Medium: Lettering
   Category: Words & Expressions
   File: assets/images/portfolio/you-priceless.jpg
   Description: A direct lettering piece centered on U R Priceless, with a soft red field and handmade script.

15. Inkspirations Studio Mark
   Medium: Brand Mark
   Category: Experimental Works
   File: assets/images/portfolio/inkspirations-mark.jpg
   Description: A studio mark exploration using blue lettering, splash, and atmosphere. It supports the identity system around the artwork.

16. Studio Blue Identity Card
   Medium: Identity Design
   Category: Experimental Works
   File: assets/images/portfolio/studio-blue-card.jpg
   Description: A compact identity card for Inkspirations Studios. It presents the studio voice in a clean public-facing format.

17. Inkspirations Logo Lockup
   Medium: Identity Design
   Category: Experimental Works
   File: assets/images/portfolio/inkspirations-logo-card.jpg
   Description: A clean logo lockup pairing calligraphic emphasis with the studio name. It is organized as supporting identity work.

18. Say No to Provoke and Blame
   Medium: Typographic Poster
   Category: Words & Expressions
   File: assets/images/portfolio/say-no-poster.jpg
   Description: A stark typographic poster built from scale, contrast, and compression. The visible phrase gives the piece its structure.

19. Small Town Teacher
   Medium: Identity Mark
   Category: Experimental Works
   File: assets/images/portfolio/small-town-teacher.jpg
   Description: A compact identity mark with a handmade, personal tone. It shows a softer side of the studio system.

20. Inkspirations Coasters / Functional Art
   Medium: Project
   Category: Functional Art
   File: assets/images/portfolio/coasters/curved-blue-object-coaster-study.jpg
   Linked section: merch-foundry.html#coasters
   Description: A functional art project for coaster sets, usable surfaces, and product-ready studio objects. These studies connect the artwork to objects people can live with.

21. Robert's Poem / Writing Piece
   Medium: Writing
   Category: Writing / Poem
   Linked section: portfolio.html#writing
   Description: A dedicated writing feature for Robert's poem and the language side of Inkspirations Studios. The piece gives the studio world a quieter verbal entry point.

## Interactive Rooms and Tools

- Flight Deck: flight-deck.html
- BeatForge Studio / Music Room: beats.html
  Access note: BeatForge is preparing for limited studio access. Visitors can request early access when Robert opens the next path.
- Ocean of Ink / Room Hub: rooms.html#ocean-of-ink
- Writing Room: rooms.html#writing-room
- Music Room: rooms.html#music-room
- Studio Process / How Robert Builds: systems-i-built.html
- Commission Request: lead-intake.html
- Guest Registry: guest-registry.html
- Merch Concept Foundry: merch-foundry.html
- T-Shirt Design Lab: t-shirt-design-lab.html
- IRIS / Studio Card: identity-card.html
- Studio Map: site-map.html

## Writing / Poem

Robert's Poem has a dedicated public feature at portfolio.html#writing. The current public poem text is: "Rain at the studio window. Ink moving like memory. A room opens, and the work begins." Word-based visual pieces are also available in the gallery under Words & Expressions.

## Coasters / Functional Art

Inkspirations Coasters / Functional Art has a dedicated portfolio feature at portfolio.html#functional and a deeper product workshop area at merch-foundry.html#coasters. The section includes image slots for coaster photos, set mockups, and functional art details.

## Merch Concept Foundry

The Merch Concept Foundry is public portfolio content at merch-foundry.html. It includes:
- Coasters / functional art
- Robertisms
- T-shirt ideas
- Product concepts
- Ocean of Ink merch ideas
- Data Zoology merch ideas
- Custom art prints
- Future mockup and image slots

## Contact

Portfolio inquiries: r.marleton@gmail.com
GLOBAL CURATION RULE
Never use automatic search results as substitutes for Robert's curated content. If a playlist, artwork collection, product collection, writing collection, recommendation, shop, or profile destination has not been created or approved yet, show "Curated by Inkspirations Studios," keep the action disabled, or wait until Robert assigns the final destination. Inkspirations Studios is a curated creative experience, not a search engine.
